as an independent non-profit organization, our budget is finite
the responsibility for determining which tests and configurations to run on the testing branch has shifted over to the developers
Intermittent (aka flaky) failures also make it hard to collect regression data
there are plans to automate it in certain circumstances in the future

fields_payload.maturity_rationale: Level 2 because both Ithax and Promotheus are 'fully deployed to manage markdown at ASOS.com' with concrete business KPIs from a randomized online test ('improvements of 86% (Promotheus) and 79% (Ithax) relative to manual strategies'). Considered level 3 but rejected because AI is scoped to the markdown/pricing function; no second distinct business function (e.g., search, recommendations, fraud) with production AI is described in this article.

evidence_spans.quote: We present two solutions for managing markdown, which are together deployed to manage markdown at ASOS.com
Ithax is used to select products to include in the markdown event. Then a price elasticity model is used to forecast likely outcomes
Ithax is a multi-objective optimization algorithm... Using a core mechanic inspired by binary search
improvements of 86% (Promotheus) and 79% (Ithax) relative to manual strategies
Stock value: total stock value, at full price (proxy for revenue)
Eleanor Loh is Lead Machine Learning Scientist for Pricing at ASOS.com
outcomes are un-observeable for prices other than those actioned historically
work continues to iterate and improve on the underlying algorithms
These systems have been fully deployed to manage markdown at ASOS.com
